chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D- 2955 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections 2. For katcha Peshi 3. For hearing of MA No 11755/2017 07.02.2018. Mr. Saad Salman Ghani Advocate for the petitioners a/w petitioners Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto Asstt:A.G alongwith ASI A.Rehman Bhatti of P.S.Baiji Sharif district Sukkur & on behalf Of SSP Sukkur. Mr. Muhammad Shah Bukhari Advocate for respondents NO.5 & 6 alongwith respondents No.5&6 -=-=- Petitioner No.1 present in court contends that she being suijuris has contracted marriage with petitioner No.2 on her own free will and accord; on account of such marriage private respondents have become annoyed, thus they are causing harassment to petitioners; she further submits that respondent No.5 has lodged FIR being crime No.72 of 2017 U/s 452, 365-B, 147 & 148 PPC at police station Baiji Sharif with regard to alleged abduction of petitioner No.1 by petitioner No.2 and others. Petitioner No.1 present submits that nobody has abducted her and she voluntarily married with the man of her own choice. Petitioners submit that they are living together happily as husband and wife. During the course of arguments we have specifically asked question from petitioner No.1; whether she wants to go with her parents to which she replied in negative, even denied to meet with her parents. Learned AAG present in court submits that case against the petitioners has already been disposed of by the competent court of law and in this regard learned AAG filed comments In view of above, this petition stands disposed of with direction to the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law.

Learned AAG present in court submits that case against the petitioners has already been disposed of by the competent court of law and in this regard learned AAG filed comments In view of above, this petition stands disposed of with direction to the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE A.Rasheed/steno
